caption:
Dior Café by Mauro Colagreco in Bangkok✨

🗺️🎁When exploring Thailand you can get 10% off on experiences on Klook.com with the code TRAVELOFFER 

Located inside Dior Gold House, featuring a signature menu of sweet treats inspired by nature 🌿🍰 in a truly unique setting with a concept store and stunning design space

Best to book online in advance ✨

📍 Dior Gold House No.1029 Phloen Chit Rd, Lumphini, Pathum Wan, Bangkok 10330, Thailand
